name: council-ti
description: The IT Council — a board of 6 AI specialists + a Lead that stress-tests technical decisions before they ship.

plugins.name: it-council
plugins.description: A board of 6 specialists (Skeptic, Senior, PO, Manager, QA, Custodian) + a Lead. Evaluates technical initiatives, plans, specs and changes across any stack; returns a verdict, an impact/effort table, risks and ONE next action.
